hypothesis: If multi horizon vote family probe is valid, the bounded tests should improve the motivating diagnostic without weakening Gold Status economics. Rationale: Chimera shows ensemble value, so test a simpler single-strategy multi-horizon vote family before relying on member-level ensembles.
stop_conditions: Chimera fails validation or is dominated by one family
quick grid has no candidate worth full certification
no new family leader improves Future Confidence and Trust
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
multi-horizon vote collapses into the existing Gold majority state
vote threshold improves full history but loses modern-era economics
expected_failure_mode: fails Gold all-era economics or Future Confidence before promotion
